videos.title: Coding is no longer the bottleneck
videos.description:
Anthropic engineers ship 8x as much code per quarter as they did, compared to 2021-2025. And it's not just engineers anymore; designers and PMs check in code too.

We’ve got more people shipping and more throughput. Which makes verification the new hard problem.

videos.title: Fiona Fung’s Claude now automatically reads her Slack every morning?
What happens after coding is solved? | Fiona Fung (Claude Code & Cowork)
videos.description: Fiona Fung leads the teams behind Claude Code and Cowork at Anthropic (overseeing Boris Cherny and the entire engineering and PM team).
